title: HomeSet Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub HomeSet (J1Pulses As Integer, J2Pulses As Integer, J3Pulses As Integer, J4Pulses As Integer [, J5Pulses As Integer] [, J6Pulses As Integer])
parameters:
J1Pulses	The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 1.

J2Pulses	The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 2.

J3Pulses	The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 3.

J4Pulses	The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 4.

J5Pulses	Optional.  The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 5.

J6Pulses	Optional.  The Home position encoder pulse value for joint 6.
description: Specifies the position used by the Home method.
see_also:
Home

MCal

HomeSet Example

VB Example:

' Set the home position at the current position

With m_spel

  .HomeSet(Pls(1), .Pls(2), .Pls(3), .Pls(4), 0, 0)

End With

C# Example:

//Set the home position at the current position

m_spel.HomeSet(m_spel.Pls(1), m_spel.Pls(2), m_spel.Pls(3),

    m_spel.Pls(4), 0 ,0);
examples:
' Set the home position at the current position
With m_spel .HomeSet(Pls(1), .Pls(2), .Pls(3), .Pls(4), 0, 0)
End With
